title: Spiral Matrix
coreIdea: Traverse a matrix in spiral order by maintaining four shrinking boundaries (top, bottom, left, right) and moving right, down, left, up in sequence, shrinking the relevant boundary after each direction pass.
recognitionCues: asks to traverse or generate a matrix in spiral/circular order
approach: Maintain top, bottom, left, right boundary pointers. Traverse left boundary row (top) left-to-right, then right boundary column top-to-bottom, then bottom row right-to-left (if still valid), then left column bottom-to-top (if still valid). Shrink each boundary after its pass and repeat until boundaries cross.
